faqs.question: How do I place an order?
faqs.answer: Choose items from the menu, add them to your cart, then open your cart to review and checkout.

faqs.question: What payment methods can I use?
faqs.answer: You can pay with Cash on Delivery (COD) or GCash at checkout.

faqs.question: Can I have my order delivered?
faqs.answer: Yes. Choose delivery at checkout and enter your address in Pototan, Iloilo.

faqs.question: Do I need an account?
faqs.answer: Yes — sign in or create a free account to order and track your history.

faqs.question: What are Crispy Picks?
faqs.answer: Crispy Picks suggests dishes based on your local weather using your browser location.

greeting: Hi! I'm Crispy AI, your guide for Crispy Crave. Ask about ordering, delivery, payments, or your account.
offTopic: I'm sorry — I can only help with Crispy Crave ordering, delivery, and your account. Try a suggested topic below.
thanks: You're welcome! If you need anything else, just ask.
clarify: I found a few topics that might match. Which one did you mean?
